message:
feat(ft-xbnl0.2.3): cx-first mcp helpers + ft secret-scan (tick 253)

Mixed sweep: two same-crate sites in `frankenterm-core/mcp.rs` plus one
cross-crate caller in `frankenterm/main.rs`.

**mcp.rs internal sites (2):**

- `resolve_pane_capabilities` L444: `storage.get_active_reservation(pane_id)`
  → `get_active_reservation_with_cx(&reservation_cx, pane_id)`. The MCP
  pane-state resolver now propagates cancel into reservation lookup.
- `record_mcp_audit` L584: `storage.record_audit_action_redacted(audit)`
  → `record_audit_action_redacted_with_cx(&audit_cx, audit)`. MCP audit
  writes now route through cx-aware mpsc backpressure instead of ambient
  fire-and-forget.

Both sites resolve cx via `Cx::current().unwrap_or_else(for_request)`
since the enclosing helpers (`resolve_pane_capabilities`,
`record_mcp_audit`) don't thread a Cx parameter — call-time resolution
picks up whatever Cx is active on the MCP handler task's worker thread.

**main.rs cross-crate caller (1):**

- `ft secret-scan` dispatch at L28740:
  `engine.scan_storage_incremental(&storage, options)` →
  `scan_storage_incremental_with_cx(&secret_cx, &storage, options)`.
  The secret-scan CLI command now invokes the cx-first path which
  threads cx through every batch iteration (`scan_segments_with_cx`,
  `latest_secret_scan_report_with_cx`, `record_secret_scan_report_with_cx`)
  with a per-batch `cx.checkpoint()`.

Legacy ambient `scan_storage_incremental` retained for test-mod callers
in secrets.rs (~5 sites) and `tests/secrets_labruntime.rs` (~5 sites).

Verification: `cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` compiles clean.

Cumulative ft-xbnl0.2.3 ticks this session: 67 (187-253).
main.rs cross-crate migration total: 127 sites (126 before + 1).
frankenterm-core internal sites: 8 (runtime.rs 6 + mcp.rs 2).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
